summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Intelligent Robots feature for NT Commerce. All 17 tests passed (100% success rate). Robots are running autonomously for inventory management, debt collection, and automated reporting.
critical_code_review_comments: RobotManager properly initializes all 3 robots (inventory, debt, report) with required services
All robot endpoints correctly require super_admin authentication (403 for tenant tokens)
SMS Service is MOCKED (logs only) - no actual SMS sent - as documented
Email Service falls back to logging when SendGrid API key is not configured
Robots auto-start on server startup via asyncio background tasks
Each robot maintains stats (checks, alerts_sent, recommendations, etc.)
Error handling is robust - robots continue running even after individual check failures
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing tenant data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Intelligent Robots feature fully tested. All 3 robots (inventory, debt, report) are running in background. Robot endpoints require super_admin auth. SMS is MOCKED. Email falls back to logging. Robot stats available via GET /api/robots/status.

robot_status_endpoint.GET_robots_status: PASS - Returns all 3 robots with is_running, stats, last_run
robot_status_endpoint.auth_required: PASS - Returns 401 without token, 403 with tenant token

robot_run_endpoints.POST_robots_run_inventory: PASS - Manually triggers inventory robot check
robot_run_endpoints.POST_robots_run_debt: PASS - Manually triggers debt robot check

robot_lifecycle_endpoints.POST_robots_stop_all: PASS - Stops all robots, is_running becomes false

mocked_apis.SMS_Service: MOCKED - Logs to console and database but does not send actual SMS
mocked_apis.Email_Service: Falls back to logging if SendGrid API key not configured
